title: The University of Allahabad Act, 2005
full_text: The University of Allahabad Act, 2005 इलाहाबाद विश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम, 2005 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200526 Act Number: 26 Enactment Date: 2005-06-23 Act Year: 2005 Short Title: The University of Allahabad Act, 2005 Hindi Title: इलाहाबाद विश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम, 2005 Long Title: An Act to declare the University of Allahabad to be an institution of national importance and to provide for its incorporation and matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Enforcement Date: 14-07-2005 Notification: 14th July, 2005, vide notification No. S.O. 978(E), dated 11th July, 2005, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The University of Allahabad Act, 2005 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Declaration of University of Allahabad as Institution of national importance. Section 3. Definitions. Section 4. Incorporation of University of Allahabad. Section 5. Effect of incorporation of Allahabad University. Section 6. Objects of University. Section 7. Powers of University. Section 8. Jurisdiction. Section 9. University open to all persons irrespective of gender, class or creed. Section 10. The Visitor. Section 11. The Chief Rector. Section 12. Officers of University. Section 13. The Chancellor. Section 14. The Vice-Chancellor. Section 15. The Pro-Vice-Chancellor. Section 16. The Deans of Faculties. Section 17. The Registrar. Section 18. The Finance Officer. Section 19. Other officers. Section 20. Authorities of University. Section 21. The Court. Section 22. The Executive Council. Section 23. The Academic Council. Section 24. The Finance Committee. Section 25. Other authorities. Section 26. The Faculties and Departments. Section 27. Power to make Statutes. Show Related Subordinates Section 28. Statutes, how to be made. Section 29. Power to make Ordinances. Show Related Subordinates Section 30. Regulations. Section 31. Annual report. Section 32. Accounts and audit. Section 33. Furnishing returns, etc. Section 34. Conditions of service of employees. Section 35. Procedure of appeal and arbitration in disciplinary cases against students. Section 36. Right to appeal. Section 37. Provident and pension funds. Section 38. Disputes as to constitution of University authorities and bodies. Section 39. Filling of casual vacancies. Section 40. Proceedings of University authorities or bodies not invalidated by vacancies. Section 41. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 42. Mode of proof of University record. Section 43. Power to remove difficulties. Section 44. Statutes, Ordinances and Regulations to be published in the Official Gazette and to be laid before Parliament. Section 45. Transitional provisions. Section 46. Amendment of Presidents Act 10 of 1973.
